title: Tenebrisque
description: Uneasing horror events that makes you feel like your being watched, you are being stalked by an invisible entity, you will never be safe.
body:
The worst kind of horror is a creature that might be smarter than you are.  

Tenebrisque is a psychological horror mod made to create the feeling of being watched. You are being stalked by an invisible entity, you will never be safe. Events are played at random intervals that affect your world, such as holes being dug, torches breaking, and mobs staring at you.
